name: Classics Index Automatic FC-303MC5B6B
description: The Classics Index Automatic remains one of Frederique Constant’s most direct expressions of accessible Swiss elegance. It is clean, easy to wear, and firmly rooted in the kind of traditional proportions that make the Classics line so dependable.

name: Classics Index Automatic FC-303MC4P6
description: With its lighter dial and classical detailing, this Index Automatic leans a little more formal than darker counterparts while preserving the same approachable everyday charm. It is simple watchmaking, but carefully judged.

name: Classics Moneta Moonphase FC-206N3S6
description: The Moneta Moonphase introduces a more ornamental and decorative side to the Classics family, balancing elegant case lines with the gentle romance of a moon-phase display. It feels feminine, polished, and distinctly dress-oriented.

name: Classics Premiere FC-301S3B6
description: The Classics Premiere captures the brand’s preference for vintage-inspired elegance in a format that remains easy to wear daily. Its restrained dial and polished case make it feel familiar in the best possible way.

name: Classics Moonphase Date Manufacture FC-716S3H6
description: By integrating in-house mechanics into a classical dress-watch framework, the Moonphase Date Manufacture gives the Classics line more horological substance without sacrificing its elegance. It is balanced, refined, and quietly ambitious.

name: Classics Tourbillon Manufacture FC-980G3H6
description: The Classics Tourbillon Manufacture shows Frederique Constant at its most aspirational, bringing a highly prestigious complication into the brand’s accessible-luxury framework. The result feels more formal and elaborate, but still recognisably Frederique Constant in tone.

name: Classics Carrée Small Seconds FC-235S2C6
description: The Carrée Small Seconds gives the Classics line a shaped case and a slightly more Art Deco sensibility. It offers a welcome change of silhouette without losing the collection’s core emphasis on clean, wearable elegance.

name: Slimline Monolithic Manufacture FC-810MC3S6
description: The Slimline Monolithic Manufacture stands out because it pairs traditional dress-watch form with a genuinely innovative silicon oscillator. It is the sort of watch that looks restrained on the surface but carries real technical interest beneath.

name: Slimline Moonphase Manufacture FC-712MS4H6
description: The Slimline Moonphase Manufacture takes one of the collection’s key themes, elegant proportion and classical complication, and executes it with admirable restraint. It feels dressy, but never stiff or overworked.

name: Slimline Perpetual Calendar Manufacture FC-775V4S4
description: One of the brand’s most respected references, the Slimline Perpetual Calendar Manufacture makes a highly sophisticated complication feel approachable and beautifully integrated. It is proof of how much can be achieved through clarity and proportion.

name: Slimline Tourbillon Manufacture FC-980S3H6
description: The Slimline Tourbillon Manufacture places its most prestigious complication inside one of Frederique Constant’s most elegant case profiles. The result is surprisingly calm and balanced, rather than overtly showy.

name: Slimline Gents Small Seconds FC-245M5S6
description: The Slimline Gents Small Seconds distils the collection’s appeal into a simple and highly wearable daily dress watch. With a slim profile and understated small seconds, it feels refined without asking for much attention.

name: Slimline Ladies Moonphase FC-206MPWD1S6B
description: The Slimline Ladies Moonphase brings the collection’s dressy, slender identity into a more jewel-like register. It remains elegant and restrained, with the moon-phase display adding just enough softness and charm.

name: Slimline Heart Beat Automatic FC-312V4S4
description: The Slimline Heart Beat uses the open-heart concept to add movement and visual interest to an otherwise highly classical dial. It is still very much a dress watch, but with a more visible connection to the mechanics inside.

name: Manufacture Classic Power Reserve Big Date FC-735S3H6
description: The Manufacture Classic Power Reserve Big Date blends practical modern complications with the brand’s more traditional case and dial language. It strikes an appealing middle ground between technical interest and conventional elegance.

name: Manufacture Classic Tourbillon FC-980N4H6
description: The Manufacture Classic Tourbillon positions one of watchmaking’s most ambitious complications inside a relatively restrained design. That tension between prestige and accessibility has long been central to Frederique Constant’s appeal.

name: Manufacture Worldtimer FC-718NWM4H6
description: The Manufacture Worldtimer remains one of Frederique Constant’s signature achievements, pairing intuitive world-time operation with a layout that feels immediately understandable. It is practical, visually rich, and unusually user-friendly.

name: Manufacture Perpetual Calendar FC-776SAL3H6
description: The Manufacture Perpetual Calendar shows how effectively Frederique Constant can democratise a prestigious complication without draining it of elegance. The calendar information is dense, but the watch stays composed and readable.

name: Manufacture Chronograph FC-760DG4H6
description: The Manufacture Chronograph gives the collection a sportier edge while keeping the overall feel polished and civilised. It is a good example of the brand’s preference for mechanical credibility delivered through classic design.

name: Manufacture Heart Beat FC-930MC4H6
description: The Manufacture Heart Beat evolves one of Frederique Constant’s most recognisable ideas by pairing the open-heart display with a stronger in-house identity. It remains elegant, but a little more visibly mechanical than the simplest Classics pieces.

name: Highlife Automatic COSC FC-303N4NH6B
description: The Highlife Automatic COSC translates Frederique Constant’s design into an integrated-bracelet format that feels contemporary and flexible. With chronometer certification and a sport-luxury profile, it is one of the brand’s strongest all-rounders.

name: Highlife Heart Beat FC-310N4NH6B
description: The Highlife Heart Beat adds the brand’s signature aperture to its more modern integrated-bracelet line, giving the watch a stronger sense of animation. It is sporty, distinctive, and clearly tied to Frederique Constant’s identity.

name: Highlife Worldtimer Manufacture FC-718N4NH6B
description: The Highlife Worldtimer Manufacture moves one of the brand’s most successful complications into a more contemporary and architectural frame. The integrated bracelet makes the watch feel more dynamic, but the dial remains surprisingly intuitive.

name: Highlife Perpetual Calendar Manufacture FC-775N4NH6B
description: This Highlife Perpetual Calendar Manufacture gives the integrated-bracelet collection serious horological weight. Despite the complexity of the calendar, the watch still feels modern and balanced rather than overdesigned.

name: Highlife Tourbillon Perpetual Calendar Manufacture FC-975N4NH6B
description: The Highlife Tourbillon Perpetual Calendar Manufacture places two flagship complications inside the brand’s most contemporary case and bracelet design. It is ambitious, visually rich, and a strong statement of what Frederique Constant aims to offer at the upper end of its catalogue.
